issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.
Documentation contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed.
Skill assumes Docker and Node.js environment, limiting cross-platform applicability.
Missing checksum verification for mc binary downloaded via curl.

scenarios.name: Wire AWS SDK Node client to self-hosted MinIO with presigned uploads
scenarios.rationale: Treatment sets `forcePathStyle: true`, uses `@aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner` `getSignedUrl` with `PutObjectCommand` and a short expiry; baseline misses `forcePathStyle` and the presigned-PUT pattern documented for browser-direct uploads.

scenarios.name: Auto-delete temp uploads after 30 days using mc CLI
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `mc alias set`, `mc mb`, and `mc ilm rule add --expiry-days 30`; baseline reaches for aws-cli `put-bucket-lifecycle-configuration` JSON instead of the documented `mc ilm` workflow.
